archetype: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Pro Creator Tools)
vibe: Professional, functional, high-end video editing software feel, brutalist clarity

headings.description: Used for page titles, big numbers, and aggressive CTAs. Creates tension and authority.

body.description: Clean, highly legible body text for dense dashboard data and SEO inputs.

mono.description: Used for timestamps, tags, character counts, and SEO metadata.

spacing_and_layout.shadows: None. Rely on 1px borders for definition to maintain the flat, pro-tool aesthetic.
spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento grids with tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use exact span ratios for dashboard summaries.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-medium rounded-sm px-6 py-2 hover:bg-[#D62828] transition-colors
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-zinc-700 text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-800 rounded-sm px-6 py-2 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-800/50 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 transition-colors

inputs.style: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-zinc-100 rounded-sm px-4 py-2 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FF3B30] focus:border-[#FF3B30] focus:outline-none transition-all placeholder:text-zinc-600

sidebar.style: w-64 bg-[#09090B] border-r border-zinc-800 h-screen fixed left-0 top-0 flex flex-col p-4
sidebar.links: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2 rounded-sm text-zinc-400 hover:text-zinc-100 hover:bg-zinc-800/50 transition-colors

canvas_editor.container: bg-black border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm overflow-hidden relative aspect-video flex items-center justify-center
canvas_editor.toolbar: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 rounded-sm p-2 flex gap-2

motion.hover: Fast and snappy: transition-all duration-150 ease-out
motion.page_load: Subtle fade and slide up: animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4 duration-500

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, language toggles, canvas tools, history items) MUST have a descriptive kebab-case data-testid attribute. Example: data-testid='generate-thumbnail-btn'.

pages_and_views.auth: Split screen: Left side dark aesthetic image overlay, right side stark minimalist login/register form with bold Cabinet Grotesk headings.
pages_and_views.dashboard: Overview of recent generations. 3-column Bento grid. Activity feed, quick action buttons to start a new SEO draft or thumbnail.
pages_and_views.thumbnail_studio: Pro editor layout. Left sidebar for tools (Upload, Text, Effects, AI Prompt). Center is the 16:9 Canvas. Right sidebar for layers/history. Language toggle top right.
pages_and_views.seo_writer: Split pane layout. Left side input (Video Topic, Keywords, Target Audience). Right side output (Title ideas in primary language + English/Turkish translation, Description with timestamps).
pages_and_views.idea_generator: Masonry or Grid layout of generated ideas. Each card acts as a starting point, with a button 'Create Thumbnail for this Idea'.

auth_hero.description: Close-up view of microphone and ring light in a professional recording studio, used for auth page split screen.

empty_state_dashboard.description: Man in dark studio editing, to be used as subtle background texture or empty state visual.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Javascript (.js) and JSX. Do not use TypeScript (.tsx).

Implement the layout with pure Tailwind CSS and raw HTML tags inside React components. Avoid overly abstracted Shadcn wrapper components for the main layout to ensure the raw, brutalist 'pro-tool' grid structure.
Ensure all input fields and buttons have `data-testid` attributes.
Implement a global state (e.g., Context API) for the Language Toggle (TR / EN) and reflect it across all tools.

For the Thumbnail Canvas, use HTML5 `<canvas>` API or a library like `fabric.js` (if appropriate, or just basic DOM-based absolute positioning over a 16:9 div) to allow text overlays, image uploading, and downloading as PNG.
Maintain strict color discipline. Do not introduce purples, teals, or gradients. Stick to the Zinc (neutral) scale and the #FF3B30 accent color.
The app must function as a mini-SaaS dashboard, complete with sidebar navigation spanning across Auth, Dashboard, Thumbnail Editor, SEO Writer, and Idea Generator.
